title: A1 Básico - Emergente
intro: The student demonstrates gradual development of language skills. They understand simple words and expressions in familiar contexts and can partially identify the topic and content with support. They interact in everyday situations using short sentences and common expressions, although they require their communication partner to speak slowly and clearly. They produce very simple texts that convey overall meaning, despite frequent spelling and grammatical errors. Vocabulary is simple and functional, with occasional reliance on their first language.
objectives: Writing basic sentences and short paragraphs
